title: The Marketing Meeting
summary: Matt Watson offered to create a visual guide for portal access to call records. Michael Donovan launched a LinkedIn pilot with Reed and Gus, focusing on human-centric sales content. Jason Branham raised concerns about lead distribution equity. Joe Furnari and Matt Watson questioned lead capture via URLs and post duplication. Michael emphasized authority over direct leads and addressing outdated content. Joe urged quick content release. Vinnie Micciche proposed a chatbot for dealerships, with Michael agreeing to a human-led, AI-assisted approach.

decisions.description: Adopt a human-led, AI-assisted approach for sales.
Initiate LinkedIn pilot program with Reed and Gus for social posts.
All social post content to be sourced from existing Stid content.
First social posts for Reed and Gus to be released this week.
Homepage updated to follow ADA format.
Change messaging topic three wording to focus on 'new car buyers'.
Vinnie Micciche to review shared content from Michael Donovan.

actionItems.task: Create visual write-up for portal access to call records.
Launch LinkedIn pilot with Reed and Gus (2 posts/week for 3 weeks).
Speak with Reed about the LinkedIn pilot program.
Ensure all social post data and facts are verifiable.
Get first social posts out for Reed and Gus this week.
Automate content production for all team members and track leads via Zoho.
Share, like, or comment on team members' LinkedIn posts.
Set up Agora Pulse for social listening and analytics.
Prioritize quick release of validated content.
Develop a chatbot for car dealerships.
Revise messaging topic three to focus on 'new car buyers'.
